quiet.def: making little or no sound; not loud.

garden.def: a piece of ground next to a house, with flowers or trees.

truck.def: a big car that carries heavy things.

road.def: a hard way that cars go on.

sky.def: the place high over your head, where the sun and clouds are.

goalkeeper.def: the player who stands at the goal and stops the ball with his hands.

goal.def: the place where the ball must go in; one score in football; also a thing you want to do.

watch.def: to look at something for some time; also a small clock you wear on your arm.

sleep.def: to rest with your eyes closed, like at night.

stop.def: to not move or not do something any more.

hill.def: a high piece of land, smaller than a mountain.

chest.def: the front part of your body, between your neck and your stomach.

deep.def: going far down; a deep breath takes in much air.

breakfast.def: the food you eat in the morning.

lunch.def: the food you eat in the middle of the day.

shoe.def: the thing you wear on your foot.

walk.def: to move on your feet, not fast.

fault.def: when the bad thing happened because of you: "It is my fault."

hospital.def: the place where doctors and nurses help sick people.

tree.def: a big plant with a wood body and green leaves.

draw.def: to make a picture with a pen or pencil.

board.def: a flat piece of wood or plastic to write or draw on.

dinner.def: the big meal you eat in the evening.

goodbye.def: the word you say when you leave someone.

plane.def: a machine that flies in the sky and carries people.

eye.def: the part of your face that you see with.

mean.def: to have as its idea: "What does this word mean?"

life.def: the time from when you are born until you die.

clothes.def: the things you wear, like shirts and trousers.

travel.def: to go from one place to another place far away.

box.def: a thing with four sides that you put things in.

paper.def: the thin white thing you write on.

sea.def: the big water that covers much of the earth.

side.def: the left or right part of something.

money.def: what you use to buy things.

mouth.def: the part of your face that you eat and talk with.

power.def: being strong; what makes things work.

body.def: all of a person ‚ÄĒ head, arms, legs, everything.

fence.def: a wall of wood or metal around a garden or field.

building.def: a thing with walls and a roof, like a house or a school.

sign.def: a mark or a board that tells you something.

send.def: to make something go to another place or person.

air.def: what you breathe; it is all around you.

hand.def: the part at the end of your arm, with five fingers.

lie.def: to say something that is not true; also to put your body flat on a bed.

picture.def: a drawing, a painting, or a photo.

head.def: the top part of your body, with your eyes and brain.

swallow.def: to make food or drink go down your throat.

rule.def: what you must or must not do in a game or a place.

land.def: the dry part of the earth; a country.

team.def: a group of players who play together.

point.def: one score in a game; also to show something with your finger.

blow.def: to push air out of your mouth.

number.def: a sign like 1, 2, or 3 that tells how many.

win.def: to be the first or the best in a game.

lose.def: to not win; to not find your thing.

fear.def: the bad feeling when you think something bad will come.

learn.def: to get to know something new.

work.def: to do a job; to go well ("it works").

bone.def: one of the hard white parts inside your body.

smooth.def: flat and easy to touch, with nothing standing up.

child.def: a young person; "children" is more than one child.

park.def: a green place in a town where people walk and play.

light.def: what the sun gives so you can see; also not heavy.

arm.def: the long part of your body between your shoulder and your hand.

around.def: on all sides of something; near.

drop.def: a very small ball of water; to let something fall.

exciting.def: making you feel very interested and happy.

touch.def: to put your hand or body on something.

shoot.def: to kick the ball hard at the goal.

shake.def: to move fast up and down or side to side.

stomach.def: the part of your body where food goes.

neck.def: the part between your head and your body.

metal.def: a hard thing like iron or gold.

finger.def: one of the five long parts of your hand.

brain.def: the part inside your head that thinks.

throat.def: the inside of your neck, where food goes down.

photo.def: a picture made with a camera.

camera.def: the thing you take photos with.

field.def: a piece of open land; football is played on a field.

shoulder.def: the top of your arm, next to your neck.

born.def: starting life: you were born on your birthday.

grass.def: the short green plants on the ground.

trousers.def: the clothes you wear on your legs.

player.def: a person who plays a game.

listen.def: to use your ears to hear something with care.

dark.def: with no light, like at night.

world.def: the earth and all the people and places on it.

language.def: the words people of one country use to talk, like English or Chinese.
